Utterances.Utterance: Do you have any gluten-free options on the menu?

ExpectedFlow.Step: Greeting_State (User: Do you have any gluten-free options on the menu?)
Provide_Options (Agent: Yes, we have several gluten-free items, including our gluten-free pasta and all salads.)
Ask_Further_Info (User: Are the pizzas available gluten-free too?)
Provide_Details (Agent: Yes, we can make any of our pizzas with a gluten-free crust for an extra $2.)
Goodbye_State (User: Great, thank you for the information.)
Disconnect_State (Agent: You're welcome. Let me know if you need anything else.)

Utterances.Utterance: What are the ingredients in the Caesar salad dressing?

ExpectedFlow.Step: Greeting_State (User: What are the ingredients in the Caesar salad dressing?)
Check_Ingredients_State
Provide_Ingredients (Agent: Our Caesar dressing contains olive oil, egg yolk, lemon juice, anchovies, garlic, and parmesan cheese.)
Ask_Allergy (Agent: Are you asking due to an allergy?)
Provide_Allergy (User: Yes, I'm allergic to seafood.)
Advise_Caution (Agent: Since it contains anchovies, I would recommend avoiding the Caesar dressing. We have a great balsamic vinaigrette that is seafood-free.)
Disconnect_State (Agent: I hope that helps!)

Utterances.Utterance: What is good to eat here? Any recommendations?

ExpectedFlow.Step: Greeting_State (User: What is good to eat here? Any recommendations?)
Provide_Recommendations (Agent: Our most popular items are the Truffle Mushroom Pasta and the BBQ Ribs. Both are excellent!)
Ask_Preference (Agent: Do you prefer pasta or meat dishes?)
Provide_Preference (User: I'm in the mood for pasta.)
Suggest_Item (Agent: Then I definitely recommend the Truffle Mushroom Pasta. It's a crowd favorite.)
Disconnect_State (Agent: Enjoy your meal!)
Greeting_State (User: What are the specials today?)
Check_Specials_State
Provide_Specials (Agent: Today's special is a Grilled Salmon with a side of roasted asparagus and a lemon butter sauce.)
Ask_Ordering (Agent: Would you like to add that to an order?)
Decline_Ordering (User: Not right now, just checking. Thanks.)
Disconnect_State (Agent: No problem. Have a great day!)
